mnemonics: CAPSULE: Classes Are Powerful Structures Unifying Logic & Entities
keyPoints: A class is a blueprint for creating objects
A class defines both state (fields/variables) and behavior (methods)
Objects are instances of classes created with the 'new' keyword
commonMistakes: Confusing classes with objects (blueprint vs actual house)
Forgetting to use 'new' keyword when creating object instances
Declaring instance variables inside methods instead of at class level
